event_summary: Testing scenario: a fictional die failure stops production of a transmission housing at a single-source foundry.
recommended_action: Test escalation workflow, tooling-transfer assumptions, and alternate foundry qualification.

event_summary: Testing scenario: a fictional customs inspection backlog adds five days to inbound wiring-harness transit.
recommended_action: Test alternate-border routing, premium freight, and build-sequencing decisions.

event_summary: Testing scenario: a fictional tier-two resin compounder requests accelerated payment after a covenant breach.
recommended_action: Test supplier-financial escalation, support options, and dual-source planning.
